As Paris is hosting the most "fashionable" Olympics in history, we explore the sporty chic fashion through the streets of Shanghai. Check out the video for some Shanghai street snaps and take a sneak peek at the official uniform of the Chinese sports delegation for victory ceremonies!

Reporter: Peng Weizi

Video Editor: Yang Sili

Videographer: Li Jian

Producer: Li Meng, Cao Xiating
